## What is broken?

Describe the issue clearly.

## Page or URL

Paste the page URL, if available.

## What did you expect to happen?

Describe the expected behavior.

## What actually happened?

Describe what you saw instead.

## Device / Browser

Examples: iPhone Safari, Android Chrome, desktop Firefox, desktop Chrome.

## Screenshots or notes

Add screenshots or other details if helpful.
